query:
-- Pass 3a: Exact name match (case-insensitive) between services.customerName and customers.name
UPDATE services AS u
JOIN customers AS c ON LOWER(TRIM(c.name)) = LOWER(TRIM(u.customerName))
SET u.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.customerName IS NOT NULL 
  AND u.customerName != ''
  AND u.customerName NOT IN ('Unassigned', '(blank)', 'Unknown');

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS rows_updated_exact_name;

-- Pass 3a: Exact name match (case-insensitive) between services.customerName and customers.name
UPDATE services AS u
JOIN customers AS c ON LOWER(TRIM(c.name)) = LOWER(TRIM(u.customerName))
SET u.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.customerName IS NOT NULL 
  AND u.customerName != ''
  AND u.customerName NOT IN ('Unassigned', '(blank)', 'Unknown');

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS rows_updated_exact_name;
